title: Software Test Engineer
responsibilities: create and maintain test cases; automate regression and smoke checks; document defects and collaborate with engineering teams
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in testing, jira, sql, postman, java. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: PixelCraft is hiring a junior software test engineer to support validating product quality through manual and automated testing.
raw_text: Vacancy V045: Software Test Engineer at PixelCraft. Location: Kharkiv. Employment: contract. Required experience: 1.5 years. Required skills: testing, jira, sql, postman, java, test automation, selenium, cypress. Optional skills: performance testing, mobile testing, ci/cd. Responsibilities: create and maintain test cases; automate regression and smoke checks; document defects and collaborate with engineering teams.
